Tool: DEAL Doughnut Data Portraits Visualiser & Data Hub
Features: Place-based doughnut diagrams; 44 dimensions across 4 lenses; data entry; save as image/SVG; explore other portraits; CC BY SA 4.0
Limitations: No API; manual data entry; no automation; basic visualization; no detail panels; no source linking
Notes: Official DEAL tool. Collaboration with InceptionU. Good for standard portraits but not extensible.

Features: Canvas-based doughnut rendering; inner/outer ring; CSV import/export; click selection; color customization
Limitations: No data management; no detail panels; basic interactivity; no responsive design; limited docs
Notes: What we're using. Good rendering engine but needs everything else built around it.

Features: Interactive policy lever adjustment; constrained optimization model; social + ecological indicators
Limitations: Not open source; national/global scale only; not designed for city portraits
Notes: Interesting interaction model (policy levers) worth studying.

Limitations: Country-level only; no city support; no source documentation
Notes: Netlify-hosted. Good for reference but different scope.

Limitations: Educational only; no data input; not a data tool
Notes: Good for understanding but not for data work.

Features: 4-lens methodology; indicator selection guidance; scoring framework
Limitations: Guide only — no software; requires building own tools
Notes: Essential methodology reference. Updated into 'Doughnut Unrolled' tools.

Tool: Doughnut Unrolled: Data Portrait of Place
Features: Framework for selecting targets/indicators; 4-lens approach; latest DEAL guidance
Notes: DEAL's current recommended approach for new portraits.
